Beat Books

November 2000
Journalism & Newsroom

IRE is now offering beat-specific books on home mortgage lending disparities and aviation safety investigations, priced at $15 for members and $20 for nonmembers.

The following beat books are now available from IRE:

Books are $15 each ($20 for nonmembers). Order online at www.ire.org/store/books or call (573) 882-2042.

"Home Mortgage Lending: How to Detect Disparities", by Jo Craven McGinty.

"Covering Aviation Safety: An Investigator's Guide", by Marie Tessier.
